# services.broadcast-box

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.broadcast-box`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.broadcast-box.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Broadcast Box. |
| `services.broadcast-box.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to enable opening WebRTC traffic ports in the firewall. Randomly selected ports will not be opened. . |
| `services.broadcast-box.package` | `package` | The broadcast-box package to use. |
| `services.broadcast-box.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (null or boolean or signed integer or string)` | Attribute set of environment variables. <https://github.com/Glimesh/broadcast-box#environment-variables> :::{.warning} The status API exposes stream keys so {env}`DISABLE_STATUS` is enabled by default. ::: |
| `services.broadcast-box.web.host` | `string` | Host address the HTTP server listens on. By default the server listens on all interfaces. |
| `services.broadcast-box.web.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to enable opening the HTTP server port and, if enabled, the HTTPS redirect server port in the firewall. . |
| `services.broadcast-box.web.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port the HTTP server listens on. |
